race.comment: MAYBE MOET (17) back in class and ready to get the job done over the 1400m. Produced a solid set of figures from back in the field when a close-up fifth to Bella Corazon over 1300m here in BM78 grade. Looks to get a solid tempo and will prove hard to stop at the good odds. CHERISH ME (3) stalked the speed and justified the good support with a determined victory over this trip at Randwick Kensington. Will benefit again with the 3kg claimer and looks to have further improvement. BIG PAPA (5) jumped in grade second-up when he demolished a good field over 1300m at this track with the 52.5kg. Tougher set-up today and place preferred. TARZING (6) progressive gelding who can go quickly through the grades this prep.
